Conestee Nature Preserve, 840 Mauldin Rd, Greenville, SC 29607, USA
Tons and tons of wild blackberries grow all along the walking paths of Connestee. Take the N/S lake loop. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-September.
Wild blackberries growing adjacent to parking lot. Lots of fruit in mid-July.
Unknown variety, naturalized at roadside in thicket Access: Public.
